sectionTitle: Excuse Me. How Do You Get to Shida?

samples.pinyin: lǎogōng a, háizi huì zǒu la.
samples.en: Honey, our child can walk now.
samples.vi: Chồng ơi, con biết đi rồi nè.

samples.pinyin: nǐ zěnme zǒu de nàme màn?
samples.en: Why are you walking so slowly?
samples.vi: Sao mà cậu đi chậm thế?

items.en: someone; lit. a person on the street

samples.pinyin: lùrén rèxīn bāng wǒ zhǐ lù.
samples.en: A passerby kindly helped me with directions.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xiàng lùrén wènle shíjiān.
samples.en: I asked a passerby for the time.

samples.meaning: help; give a hand; lend a hand; do a favour; do a good turn
samples.pinyin: tā xūyào nǐ de bāngmáng.
samples.en: He needs your help.
samples.vi: Anh ấy cần sự giúp đỡ của bạn.

samples.meaning: help; give a hand; lend a hand; do a favour; do a good turn
samples.pinyin: tā lái bāngmáng bān dōngxi.
samples.en: He came to help move things.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đến giúp chuyển đồ.

items.en: to be lost, to have lost directions

samples.meaning: stray; get lost; lose one's way; lose one's bearings; go the wrong way; can't find one's way
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yǐ wánquán mílùle.
samples.en: We are completely lost.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi hoàn toàn lạc đường rồi.

samples.meaning: stray; get lost; lose one's way; lose one's bearings; go the wrong way; can't find one's way
samples.sentence: 我們在森林裡/裏迷路了。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen zài sēnlín lǐ mílùle.
samples.en: We are lost in the forest.
samples.vi: Chúng ta bị lạc đường trong rừng.

samples.pinyin: shàng yǒu fùmǔ, xià yǒu érnǚ.
samples.en: Above are parents, below are children.

samples.en: Above is the boss, below are employees.
samples.vi: Trên có sếp, dưới có nhân viên.

samples.pinyin: tā gānggāng xià chuáng zǒu lái zǒu qù.
samples.en: He just got out of bed and walked around.

samples.sentence: 我們準備下山迴傢去了。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen zhǔnbèi xiàshān huí jiā qùle.
samples.en: We are ready to go down the mountain and head home.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen zǒu cuòle lùkǒu.

samples.pinyin: zhè duàn mùtou hěn jiēshi.

samples.pinyin: tā shì dì sān gè dàodá de.

samples.pinyin: nǐ dì guǎn shuō, wǒ tīngzhe.

samples.pinyin: qǐng zài hónglǜdēng qián tíngchē.

samples.pinyin: qǐng gàosù wǒ nǐ dì dìzhǐ.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xūyào zhǎodào tí kuǎn jī.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ yīnggāi zuò de.

items.vi: Sư Đại (Đại học Sư phạm Đài Loan)

samples.pinyin: tā zài shī dà xuéxí jiàoyù xué.

samples.pinyin: shī dà shì wǒ mèngxiǎng de xuéxiào.

samples.pinyin: tā shì yīgè hépíng de rén.

samples.pinyin: tā de tàidù fēicháng hépíng.
samples.en: His attitude is very peaceful.

samples.sentence: 我們希望世界能保持和平。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen xīwàng shìjiè néng bǎochí hépíng.

items.vi: nhu yếu phẩm / đồ dùng hàng ngày

samples.pinyin: wǒ xū yāo mǎi yīxiē rìyòngpǐn.

samples.sentence: 從廣州去北京要經過武漢。

samples.sentence: 從我傢到公司經過一所學校。

samples.meaning: after; through; as a result of
samples.sentence: 經過兩年，我學會説漢語了。
samples.pinyin: jīngguò liǎng nián, wǒ xuéhuì shuō hànyǔle.
samples.en: After two years, I learned to speak Chinese.

samples.meaning: after; through; as a result of
samples.sentence: 經過討論，大傢決定放棄。
samples.pinyin: jīngguò tǎolùn, dàjiā juédìng fàngqì.
samples.en: After discussion, everyone decided to give up.

samples.pinyin: zhè tiáo xiàngzi hěn ānjìng.

samples.pinyin: tā cóng xiàngzi lǐ zǒu chūlái.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xiànzài gǎnjué hěn è.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yǒudiǎn èle, xiǎng chīfàn.

samples.pinyin: méiyǒu shíwù, wǒmen zhǐ néng èzhe.
samples.en: Without food, we can only stay hungry.

samples.sentence: 這塊木料有一邊不光滑。
samples.pinyin: zhè kuài mùliào yǒu yībiān bù guānghuá.
samples.en: This piece of wood has one side that is not smooth.

samples.sentence: 兩方麵爭論，總有一邊理屈。
samples.pinyin: liǎng fāngmiàn zhēnglùn, zǒng yǒu yībiān lǐqū.

samples.meaning: while; as; at the same time; simultaneously
samples.sentence: 他慢慢往前走，一邊唱著歌兒。
samples.pinyin: tā màn man wǎng qián zǒu, yībiān chàngzhe gēr.

samples.meaning: while; as; at the same time; simultaneously

samples.pinyin: tāmen liǎ zhēnshi yībiān gāo.

samples.pinyin: tiānxià wūyā quán shì yībiān hēi.

samples.pinyin: niúdùn fāxiàn wànyǒuyǐnlì.

samples.meaning: happen to; chance to; as it happens

samples.sentence: 今年六一節, 正好是我的生日。
samples.pinyin: jīnnián liùyī jié, zhènghǎo shì wǒ de shēngrì.

samples.sentence: 這是我們最後剩下的幾個蘋果。
samples.pinyin: zhè shì wǒmen zuìhòu shèng xià de jǐ gè píngguǒ.
samples.en: These are the last of our apples.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì yī gēn shùzhī.
samples.en: This is a tree branch.
samples.vi: Đây là một cành cây.

samples.pinyin: shùzhī shàng zhǎng mǎnle píngguǒ.
samples.en: The branches were laden with apples.
samples.vi: Có đầy táo trên cành cây.

samples.pinyin: tā sòng gěi wǒ yīzhī méiguī huā.
samples.en: He gave me a rose.
samples.vi: Anh ấy tặng tôi một nhành hoa hồng.

samples.pinyin: wǒ diǎnránle yīzhī làzhú.
samples.en: I lit a candle.
samples.vi: Tôi đã thắp một cây nến.

samples.pinyin: wǒ hěn xǐhuan zhè zhī máobǐ.
samples.en: I really like this brush.
samples.vi: Tôi rất thích chiếc bút lông này.

samples.pinyin: qǐng bǎ bǐ fàng zài zhuōzi shàng.
samples.en: Please put the pen on the table.
samples.vi: Xin hãy đặt bút lên bàn.

samples.pinyin: tā qǐng péngyou dàibǐ xiě xìn.
samples.en: He asked a friend to write the letter on his behalf.

samples.pinyin: wǒ bǐle yī fēng qīnbǐ xìn.
samples.en: I wrote a handwritten letter.
samples.vi: Tôi đã viết một bức thư tay.

samples.meaning: used for sums of money, financial accounts, debts, etc.
samples.pinyin: tā yǒuyī bǐ dàikuǎn yào huán.
samples.en: He has a loan to repay.
samples.vi: Anh ta có một khoản vay phải trả.

samples.meaning: used for sums of money, financial accounts, debts, etc.
samples.pinyin: tā huāle yī bǐ jù kuǎn mǎifáng.
samples.en: He spent a huge sum of money to buy a house.

samples.pinyin: suàn de běn fēnchéng hěnduō bàn.
samples.en: Garlic is divided into many cloves.

samples.sentence: 這棵植物的本非常結實。
samples.pinyin: zhè kē zhíwù de běn fēicháng jiēshi.
samples.en: The root of this plant is very strong.

samples.pinyin: tā mǎile sì běn cídiǎn.
samples.en: She bought four dictionaries.

samples.pinyin: nà běn zázhì hěn yǒuyìsi.
samples.en: That magazine is very interesting.
samples.vi: Quyển tạp chí kia rất hay.

samples.pinyin: tā de běnyì bùshì zhèyàng de.
samples.en: His original intention was not like this.

samples.pinyin: wèntí de běnzhí hěn fùzá.
samples.en: The essence of the problem is very complicated.

samples.pinyin: zhè běn shū běnlái shì wǒ de.
samples.en: This book was originally mine.
samples.vi: Quyển sách này vốn dĩ là của tôi.

samples.pinyin: wǒ běn xiǎng qù kàn diànyǐng de.
samples.en: I originally wanted to go see a movie.

samples.pinyin: tā běn guījǔ bànshì, hěn rènzhēn.
samples.en: He acts according to the rules, very seriously.

samples.sentence: 本計劃，我們下週齣髮/發。
samples.pinyin: běn jìhuà, wǒmen xià zhōu chūfā.
samples.en: According to the plan, we will leave next week.

samples.sentence: 本校有著優秀的師資隊伍。
samples.pinyin: běnxiào yǒuzhe yōuxiù de shīzī duìwǔ.
samples.en: Our school has an excellent teaching staff.
samples.vi: Trường chúng tôi có đội ngũ giáo viên xuất sắc.

samples.sentence: 本廠的産品質量非常好。
samples.pinyin: běn chǎng de chǎnpǐn zhì liàng fēicháng hǎo.
samples.en: The products of our factory are of very good quality.
samples.vi: Sản phẩm của chúng tôi có chất lượng rất tốt.

samples.sentence: 本著有關規定執行操作。
samples.pinyin: běnzhe yǒuguān guīdìng zhíxíng cāozuò.
samples.en: Operate in line with the relevant regulations.

samples.sentence: 本此原則，妥為處理此事。
samples.pinyin: běn cǐ yuánzé, tuǒ wéi chǔlǐ cǐ shì.
samples.en: Handle this matter properly based on this principle.

samples.pinyin: lián běnzi yīgòng 120 kuài qián.
samples.en: Including the notebook, it's 120 yuan in total.

samples.sentence: 請填寫結算本子上的金額。
samples.pinyin: Qǐng tiánxiě jiésuàn běnzi shàng de jīn'é.
samples.en: Please fill in the amount on the settlement book.

samples.pinyin: xiàng zuǒ zhuǎn, ránhòu zhí zǒu.
samples.en: Turn left and then walk straight.

samples.pinyin: xià gè jiāotōng dēng zuǒ zhuǎn.
samples.en: At next traffic lights, we turn left.

samples.pinyin: cǐ lù bù tōng.
samples.en: Not a Through Road.

samples.sentence: 路漫漫其脩遠兮, 吾將上下而求索。(屈原《離騷》)
samples.pinyin: lù mànmàn qí xiū yuǎn xī, wú jiāng shàng-xià ér qiú suǒ.
samples.en: The road ahead is long and far; I will search high and low with unyielding pursuit.

samples.pinyin: zhè lùrén bùkě shēnjiāo.
samples.en: This kind of person is not worth getting close to.

samples.sentence: 學生們很快就排成兩路。
samples.pinyin: xuéshēngmen hěn kuài jiù pái chéng liǎng lù.
samples.en: The students quickly lined up in two rows.

samples.sentence: 我在商店買了很多東西。
samples.pinyin: wǒ zài shāngdiàn mǎile hěnduō dōngxi.
samples.en: I bought a lot of things in the store.

samples.sentence: 我傢附近有一個小商店。
samples.pinyin: wǒjiā fùjìn yǒu yīgè xiǎo shāngdiàn.
samples.en: There is a small store near my home.
